title: Ligation
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"dus5q","text":"Protocol for a Ligation with Master Mix Ligase after a restriction digestion protocol had been made.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"i7ki","text":"Ultra Pure Water","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5v9bb","text":"Digested fragment of DNA vector with EcoRI \u0026 PstI","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"37i5q","text":"Digested fragment of DNA insert with Xbal Pstl","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"84ejv","text":"Master Mix Ligase","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Add 5 µL of Master Mix Ligase
Add the a quantity of the DNA vector digested by EcoRI and PstI in a molar ratio 1:3 with the DNA insert
Add the a quantity of the DNA insert digested by EcoRI and PstI in a molar ratio 3:1 with the DNA vector
Transform with 5 µL of the product
creator: Georgina Elisa Diego Macías
